framework.name: Multi-Platform Fragmentation Challenge
framework.description: Financial services facing challenge of 'agents built on a growing number of platforms by both Line of Business users and professional developers' making 'consistent, centralized compliance... difficult.' Suggests lack of cross-platform authorization standards.
framework.raw_quote: With agents built on a growing number of platforms by both Line of Business users and professional developers alike, consistent, centralized compliance becomes difficult.

source.title: Compliance for AI Agents: What Financial Services Organizations Need to Know - Banking Exchange
